comments: Approved. The amendment explicitly records the executed facts for V0.6-M1, V0.6-M2, and V0.6-M3: M1 covers global .DS_Store purging and .gitignore updates; M2 covers relocating audit/, qa/, release/, and retros/ into .archive/ with a manifest; M3 covers rebuilding the documentation center into HUMAN_GUIDES, AI_GUIDES, and SAMPLES and refactoring README.md into a minimalist navigator. The revised canonical milestone map preserves the remaining required V0.6 objectives across M4-M6 rather than deleting them. It explicitly states that the original kickoff commitments for Path/Runtime Hardening and Integration Smoke/Workflow Consistency are not deleted and are incorporated into the remaining milestones as mandatory workstreams and exit criteria. M4 preserves bootstrap/enablement with a mandatory exit criterion tied to unified documentation paths. M5 explicitly preserves the V0.5 path resolution fragility carry-over for get_iteration_state and get_execution_diff and requires robust runtime hardening for MCP server paths. M6 explicitly preserves integration smoke and workflow state consistency work, plus the V0.5 carry-overs for Reviewer Output Delivery and Approval Gating Automation, alongside the remaining comparative synthesis and archival tasks. The review packet criterion requiring that no implementation files or directories are modified by this amendment is satisfied by the amendment text itself, which only normalizes milestone planning/documentation and does not describe code or implementation tree changes as part of the amendment artifact.
